calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvette Davis, via ZOOM, for Angelo Cibrian, Personal Representative.

The court at the outset advises Ms. Davis regarding its concern that the supplement filed included a change so substantial that an amendment should have been filed instead. Ms. Davis provides oral testimony including that the supplement requests removing attorney fees that had been previously requested and believes that an amended petition is not required. The court then turns to the question regarding whether the more than $48,000 is an estate asset. Ms. Davis reports that the Beneficiary would have paid more in the partition action, had it not been included as an estate asset.

After additional discussion, the Accounting petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: E. Prado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yvette Davis appeared by telephone for Angelo Cibrian.

Mr. Davis stated that a petition for approval of report on status of administration was filed with a hearing date of February 25, 2020. Status on close of estate and the order to appear are off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Continued To Dec-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on December 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
